title: Nursing Homes Data Dashboard | NHSN | CDC
text:
ong residents and HCP of CMS-certified nursing homes. These national and state-level summaries represent data from approximately 15,000 nursing homes that report to NHSN.
Additional information and resources about this surveillance can be found here: Long-Term Care Respiratory Pathogens .
This data dashboard is updated weekly on Thursdays at 8:00 AM.
Top of Page Vaccination Coverage among Nursing Home Residents 
Weekly cumulative percent of nursing home residents vaccinated COVID-19 vaccine, the seasonal influenza vaccine, and RSV vaccine. Preliminary data are shaded in gray.
The 2025–2026 flu season is shown here as beginning in October, when vaccinations are typically first available. 
Influenza vaccine: percent of residents vaccinated with 2024-25/2025-26 seasonal influenza vaccine. 
RSV vaccine: percent of residents vaccinated with RSV vaccine. 
COVID-19 vaccine: percent of residents up to date with COVID-19 vaccines. The NHSN surveillance definition [PDF – 1MB] definition of up to date with COVID-19 vaccines is updated quarterly to incorporate vaccine guidance changes. 
Top of Page Hospitalization Rates per 100,000 Nursing Home Residents 
Weekly hospitalizations with a positive respiratory viral test per 100,000 residents from CDC’s National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN). Preliminary data are shaded in gray.
